ESTIMATES OF RADIONUCLIDE MOVEMENT THROUGH THE GROUND
C PROGRAM TO DEPCT THE DISTRIBUTION OF RADIGNUCLIDES IN THE GROUND
C THIS LOOP CALCULATES THE BEHAVIOR FOR EACH DESIGNATED TIME
C THIS LOOP CALCULATES THE BEHAVIOR FOR EACH DISTANCE SPECIFIED
Subroutine Npoa (Xarg, Type, Ord, Area, Err)
C PROGRAM TO DEPICT THE MOVEMENT OF RADIONUCLIDES IN THE GROUND AS A
C FACTOR IS THE WEIGHT OF SOIL CONTACTED BY ONE ML OF SOLUTION IN G/ML
C TYPICAL VALUES OF FACTOR RANGE FROM 5 TO 8
C TLEAK IS THE DURATION OF LEAKAGE IN YEARS
C V IS THE GROUNDWATER VELOCITY IN METERS PER DAY
C (Real Distance Of Travel Divided By The Travel Time)
C C IS THE SALT CONCENTRATION OF THE LEAKING SOLUTION IN MEQ/ML
C CGW IS THE SALT CONCENTRATION OF THE GROUNDWATER IN MEQ/ML
C PLHT IS THE THEORETICAL PLATE HEIGHT IN METERS
C THE HOMOGENEITY OF THE FORMATION AND GROUNDWATER VELOCITY
C FOR DOWNWARD PERCOLATION INTO A SOIL OR FOR A LABORATORY COLUMN
C VALUES MAY BE ON THE ORDER OF A FEW CENTIMETERS
C D IS THE DISTANCE OF TRAVEL IN METERS
C A IS THE IDENTITY OF THE RADIONUCLIDE
C HL IS THE HALF LIFE OF THE RADIONUCLIDE IN YEARS
C DC IS THE SOIL ROD FOR THE RADIONUCLIDE IN THE LEAKING SOLUTION IN ML/G
C DK IS THE SOIL KO FOR THE RADIONUCLIDE IN GROUNDWATER IN ML/G
C MEASURED VALUES ARE BEST FOR THE KO BUT THEY CAN BE ESTIMATED KNOWING THE
C CHEMISTRY OF THE SOLUTIONS AND THE MINERALOGY OF THE FORMATION
Subroutine Npga (Xarg, Type, Ord, Area, Err)
